consensus_score.technique_summary: Video content appears to be instructional demonstration showing endoloop setup and technique concepts rather than a complete task performance
strengths: Clear demonstration of proper extracorporeal knot technique
Good visualization of C-shape loop configuration
Proper setup and equipment positioning shown
improvement_suggestions: For actual task performance, focus on smooth loop deployment
Practice pusher engagement and advancement technique
Ensure complete task execution including loop cinching and tail cutting

disagreements.rationale: Teacher A correctly identifies this as instructional content with no actual task completion, assigning maximum time penalty. Teacher B appears to have misinterpreted demonstration segments as actual performance. Frame evidence shows setup demonstrations and technique explanations rather than continuous task execution.

While Teacher A correctly identifies instructional nature, the penalty structure should be reflected in time scoring rather than separate incomplete_task penalty. Maximum time (180s) already represents non-completion.
Teacher A's assessment is correct - this is instructional content showing task setup and technique concepts, not actual task performance. No loop deployment and cinching was completed.
